---
title: "S3: Hyperspheres, Quaternions, And Hopf Coils"
---

S3 pages are scaffolded for finite hypersphere, quaternion, Hopf, and spin chapters.

<div class="warning-box">
This section separates checked coordinate and algebra seeds from full topology, SO(3), robotics, and fibration claims. Treat a claim as proved only through the generated theorem cards.
</div>

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="S3Q-T0001"></div>
<div class="dictionary-box" data-dictionary-id="S3Q-0001"></div>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
